title: selaginella alopecuroides
intro: Selaginella alopecuroides, also known as the 'hairy spikemoss', is a small, perennial plant species belonging to the spikemoss family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella alopecuroides are said to range from alleviating respiratory issues to reducing fever and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or added to salves and ointments for topical application.
